description: DB integration: migrations create all four tables + project_phases.completed_at + invoices.project_id; tenant metadata registration present; constraint checks (amount XOR percentage, unique config per project, status enum) enforced by real inserts
Contract: createProjectBillingConfig happy path + rejects currency mismatch with client billing currency + rejects second config for same project
Contract: updateProjectBillingConfig rejects billing_model change once an entry is invoiced; allows before; total_price edit re-validates schedule
Contract: schedule entry CRUD — pending editable, invoiced immutable, amount XOR percentage validated at action layer
Unit: computeEntryAmount — percentage of total, cents rounding, remainder assigned to final entry so schedule sums exactly to total_price
Contract: allocation validation — approving final entry blocked when schedule does not sum to total_price; earlier entries approve with warning

Contract: status lifecycle — pending→ready→approved→invoiced transitions succeed; illegal transitions (pending→approved, invoiced→ready) rejected; optimistic status precondition prevents double-approve
Contract: markPhaseComplete sets completed_at and flips linked entries pending→ready; reopenPhase reverts ready (not approved) entries to pending
Unit: date-triggered readiness — entries flip to ready when trigger_date reached, not before
Contract: deleting a phase with a linked entry falls the entry back to manual trigger and flags it

Engine integration: recurring run picks up approved recurring-mode milestone entries for the client, emits project_milestone charges with correct amounts, skips standalone-mode and non-approved entries

Engine integration: generateProjectInvoice creates a standalone invoice stamped project_id containing only the target project's approved entries; entries stamped invoiced+invoice_charge_id in same transaction
Engine integration: standalone T&M project invoice includes the project's uninvoiced approved time and materials alongside milestone charges
Engine integration: fixed-price exclusion — approved time on a fixed_price project produces no time charges via contract lines nor the unresolved path; same time on a T&M project still bills
Engine integration: phase rate override changes the rate for entries in that phase only (other phases bill at contract rate); service filter and override_service_id re-mapping honored
Engine integration: hard cap — multi-run scenario where second run straddles the cap: charge partially written down (write_down_amount set), cumulative billed equals cap exactly, third run bills zero
Engine integration: notify cap — no write-downs; PROJECT_BUDGET_THRESHOLD_REACHED emitted once per threshold across repeated runs (dedupe via notified_thresholds)
Concurrency: two parallel invoice generation runs against one capped project cannot double-spend the cap (FOR UPDATE serialization)
Engine integration: deposit credit treatment — finalization creates client credit earmarked project_id; later standalone invoice for the project draws it down
Engine integration: deduct_final treatment — final milestone charge reduced by prior deposit; invoice totals correct

Regression (passthrough guarantee): golden scenario with contracts, ticket+project time, materials, buckets produces byte-identical billing output with the feature code present but no project_billing_configs rows
Engine integration: milestone charges taxed via TaxService per config taxability; tax distribution across invoice correct
Engine integration: un-finalizing a draft project invoice reverts entries to approved and rolls back cap usage deltas; regenerating produces the same result
Contract: recurringApprovalBlockers returns a warning (not a block) for a client with a ready entry older than 7 days
Contract: project cancellation auto-cancels un-invoiced entries, leaves invoiced ones, and flags deposit-exceeds-billed
Contract: PROJECT_MILESTONE_READY event published on ready transition; notification templates resolve for email + in-app
RBAC: approve/hold/cancel and config CRUD rejected server-side for a user without billing permissions; markPhaseComplete allowed for PM without billing permissions
UI (Playwright): enable-billing wizard on a project creates a fixed-price config; billing view appears in ViewSwitcher and renders schedule table with allocation footer
UI (Playwright): add schedule entries (%, $, phase/date/manual triggers) via dialog; footer flips to 100% allocated; entry linked to phase shows $ badge in phases panel
UI (Playwright): mark phase complete from board header → linked entry becomes ready (chip + toast), Billed bar appears in metadata row with ready segment
UI (Playwright): Approve & invoice from schedule table on standalone project generates invoice; entry chip shows Invoiced with invoice link
UI (Playwright): Invoicing Hub Project Billing tab lists ready entries with badge count; bulk approve moves them to approved; Approve & invoice now hidden for recurring-mode projects
UI (Playwright): T&M config with cap + thresholds + hard-cap toggle saves; budget vs actual card renders burn bar with threshold markers
UI (Playwright): billing view absent from ViewSwitcher for a user without billing permissions
UI (Playwright): client portal project shows billing summary only when show_billing enabled; hidden by default
Integration: profitability report — fixed-price project shows schedule revenue vs time-at-cost; project time absent from hourly revenue; T&M write-downs line present
Integration: accounting export includes project_milestone/project_deposit charges with project reference metadata; deposit credit exported per existing credit treatment
Integration: invoice PDF/template rendering resolves project template variables (name, number) on a standalone project invoice
Guard (DB failure case): schedule entry insert violating amount XOR percentage and invalid status transition via raw model are rejected by constraints, not just app validation
